etymology.description: 木(木) (mù, "tree") + 寸(寸) (cùn, "hand") = to plant a tree -> fused into 壴
etymology.interpretation: The character 尌 combines the components 木(木) (mù, "tree") and 寸(寸) (cùn, "hand") to represent the idea of planting a tree. Over time, the components 木 and 豆 fused into the character's current form, 壴, which conveys the same action of planting through its pictorial representation.
